name: Select
description: Custom dropdown select with retro styling. Provides a fully accessible select experience with keyboard navigation and customizable states.

options.description: Array of option objects with value, label, and optional disabled properties

placeholder.description: Placeholder text when no value is selected

onChange.description: Callback fired when selection changes, receives the selected value

error.description: Show error state with red border

fullWidth.description: Expand select to fill container width

examples.name: Basic select
examples.code: <Select options={[{value: 'a', label: 'Option A'}, {value: 'b', label: 'Option B'}]} value={selected} onChange={setSelected} />

examples.name: With disabled option
examples.code: <Select options={[{value: 'a', label: 'Option A'}, {value: 'b', label: 'Option B', disabled: true}]} value={selected} onChange={setSelected} />
